# Customs and Duties

When ordering internationally from Acme Shop, customers should be informed of potential import duties and taxes, commonly known as customs fees, which are determined by the destination country based on item value and type. Acme Shop does not control these fees; hence, customers must settle any duties and taxes upon receipt. Customs processing times may extend delivery estimates, and while some countries offer pre-paid options for these fees, it is not universally available. If a package is held or returned due to non-payment of duties, Acme Shop will reach out to discuss further options.

[Source: international_shipping.md#customs-and-duties]
